title: Model
description: An AI model referenced in Model Mondays episodes or transcripts.

id.description: Slug identifier, matches the YAML filename without extension.

name.description: Display name of the model (e.g. 'GPT-4o', 'Phi-4', 'Command R+').

description.description: Brief description of the model's purpose and strengths.

catalogUrl.description: URL to the model card on ai.azure.com/catalog/models/<model-name>.

publisherUrl.description: URL to the publisher/provider page on ai.azure.com/catalog/publishers/<provider>.

providerUrl.description: URL to the provider's own model page (external).

learnUrl.description: URL to relevant Microsoft Learn documentation.

openSource.description: Whether the model weights are openly available.

status.description: Lifecycle status: 'new' (added in last 30 days), 'active', 'deprecated' (scheduled removal), 'retired' (removed from catalog).

statusUpdatedAt.description: Date the status was last checked/updated.

episodes.description: Episode IDs where this model is discussed.
